name: Whole Wheat Pita Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, add yeast and honey to warm water. Let stand until foamy, about 5 minutes.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, salt, and yeast mixture. Stir until dough can be gathered into a ball.
3. Knead dough on a floured board until smooth. Place dough in a large, lightly oiled bowl.
4. Cover with a damp towel and place in a dry, draft-free place until dough has doubled, 1 to 2 hours.
5. Punch down dough; turn out onto a lightly floured board. Divide into 12 equal pieces.
6. Shape into circles and place on nonstick cookie sheets. Let rest, covered with a damp towel for 30 minutes.
7. On a lightly floured board, roll each piece of dough to a circle about 5 inches in diameter. Place on cookie sheets. Let stand about 30 minutes.
8. Bake on the middle rack of a preheated 500°F oven for 5 minutes. Remove pites from cookie sheets and let cool on a rack.
9. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. To serve, reheat wrapped in aluminum foil at 350°F for 10 minutes.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 1/2 STARCH EXCHANGES
CHO: 21g; PRO: 3g; FAT: 0g; CAL: 99
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt.
